name: Ilma, Keeper of the Board
role: Thirty-year keeper of the Edge District accountability board — the woman who has never seen this before
voiceHints: Dry, precise, uninterested in being liked. Says exactly what the record says and stops. When she volunteers something beyond the record, it costs her, and you should listen.
knowledge: Every marking on the Edge District board for thirty years, in order
Which ones had records and which did not — and there is a pattern
That Overseer Grael has never once put his name to anything
wants: For the board to mean what it says it means.
fears: That she is the only one who remembers, and that when she stops, it stops.

reactsToReputation.evasive: she stops talking and does not start again
reactsToReputation.any: she will not lie to you, and she will not protect you from what she knows

appearance: Short and square, sixties, iron-grey hair pinned up and escaping, reading-lenses on a cord. Ink on the left hand — she writes left-handed and smudges. A ledger-callus on the middle finger you could feel through a glove.
domainsNote: Derived from this NPC's authored spectrum against the great circle (SNG-174). Kind and domain are independent: a people tends toward positions, an individual holds their own.
